content.text: Implemented JWT auth end to end. Added src/utils/auth.ts with signToken/verifyToken, added src/api/auth.ts with loginHandler and authMiddleware, created src/components/AuthGuard.tsx, and wired routes so /login is public while /users is protected. Added tests in tests/utils/auth.test.ts and tests/api/auth.test.ts; npm test passed with 8 tests across 3 files and typecheck is clean. Diff stat shows 6 files changed with focused auth additions.
